curriculum.profileParagraph1: I work where strategy meets motion. Over eight years I've built visual systems for global brands across automotive, finance and culture Ã¢ÂÂ designing how a brand moves, not only how it looks.
curriculum.profileParagraph2: My background as a musician shapes everything: pacing, weight, silence. Today I lead Pelimotion Hub, where we develop AI-integrated motion pipelines and direct immersive experiences Ã¢ÂÂ combining motion design with light and projection for theater and live performances.

coverLetter.opening: I'm Felipe ConceiÃÂ§ÃÂ£o Ã¢ÂÂ a Creative Director with eight years building visual systems that move brands forward. My work sits at the intersection of motion design, brand strategy, and emerging technology, and I believe it aligns closely with the creative vision your team is shaping.
coverLetter.body1: At Pelimotion Hub, I've led end-to-end creative direction for brands like BMW, Suzano, and EQI Ã¢ÂÂ translating business objectives into motion-driven brand identities that perform across digital, broadcast, and immersive formats. I don't just design how a brand looks; I design how it moves, breathes, and connects with its audience.
coverLetter.body2: What sets my approach apart is a deep technical foundation paired with artistic sensibility. My background in music gives me an intuitive understanding of rhythm, pacing, and tension Ã¢ÂÂ qualities that elevate motion work from decoration to storytelling. Today, I'm actively integrating AI-driven generative pipelines into production workflows, reducing turnaround times while expanding creative possibilities.
coverLetter.body3: I'm particularly drawn to environments where creative ambition meets strategic rigor. Whether directing a projection-mapped installation or systematizing a modular motion toolkit for a global brand, I bring the same commitment: clarity of vision, precision in execution, and a relentless drive to push the craft forward.
coverLetter.closing: I'd welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience in motion branding, artistic direction, and creative technology could contribute to your team's goals. I'm available for a portfolio walkthrough at your convenience.

sections.title: OPENING
sections.body: I'm Felipe ConceiÃÂ§ÃÂ£o Ã¢ÂÂ Creative Director and motion designer behind Pelimotion Hub in Rio de Janeiro. For eight years I've been building visual systems for brands across Latin America and beyond: from full motion branding campaigns to modular asset libraries that marketing teams keep using long after launch day.

sections.title: WHAT I BRING
sections.body: My work lives at the intersection of strategy and execution. I concept, direct, and deliver Ã¢ÂÂ in After Effects, Illustrator, Premiere, and Figma Ã¢ÂÂ without needing a layer of translation between creative thinking and the timeline. I've produced CGI/motion content for BMW, Subaru, Hyundai, and Motul, and led the full motion branding for a brand relaunch that included both the launch film and a complete Motion Media Kit for ongoing marketing use.

sections.title: WHY DIFFERENT
sections.body: I approach motion the way a musician approaches rhythm Ã¢ÂÂ timing, weight, silence. That foundation, combined with AI-integrated workflows and a minimalist design philosophy, means I move fast without losing craft. Fluent in async-first communication, accustomed to U.S. client standards, English at professional level.

sections.title: WHY NEAR & WHY NOW
sections.body: Near's model Ã¢ÂÂ connecting LatAm talent with high-growth U.S. companies Ã¢ÂÂ is exactly the move I've been building toward. Performance marketing demands motion that works, not just motion that looks good. That tension between aesthetics and results is where I'm most at home. Ready for full-time commitment and the pace this role requires.
